meaning: adj.[动](有)口的,嘴的,[植]气孔的
examples: Conclusion: the method was simple, rapid and accurate, and can be used for the quality control of stomatic ulcer paste.
In the plant organs, the stomatic distribution characteristics of leaf epidermis may be taken as an evidence of plant classification.
The best regression models (e. g. Ulmus pumila) of leaf content against air SO2 and leaf stomatic resistance could explain that the sulfur acted as pollutant entered plant mainly through stoma.
